pr.title: Extract retry/backoff into a RetryPolicy used by the gateway client
pr.author: rmenon

summary: Pulls retry behavior out of Client into a dedicated RetryPolicy (exponential backoff + jitter, plus a ShouldRetry predicate). Client now composes a *RetryPolicy and its Do method runs the attempt loop. Cleaner separation; two correctness concerns (body replay on retried requests, blanket 5xx retry for non-idempotent calls) and a zero-value panic to fix.

structure.diagram_title: gateway client gains a retry layer

findings.title: Retried request re-sends an already-consumed body
findings.body: On a POST, the first RoundTrip drains req.Body; the next attempt sends the same request with an empty body. Rebuild it per attempt via req.GetBody, or clone the request.

findings.title: Blanket 5xx retry is unsafe for non-idempotent requests
findings.body: ShouldRetry returns true for every 5xx regardless of method. A POST that already applied server-side but returned 502 from a proxy will be double-applied. Gate on method idempotency or an explicit allowlist, and honor Retry-After.

findings.title: Backoff panics when baseDelay is the zero value
findings.body: rand.Int63n(int64(d)/2) panics when its argument <= 0, which happens if baseDelay is unset. Guard the jitter or default baseDelay in the constructor.

findings.title: Per-attempt context check is the right call
findings.body: Checking req.Context().Err() before each attempt means a cancelled request bails immediately instead of sleeping through the whole schedule. Nice.

findings.title: Test covers Backoff growth but not ShouldRetry or the Do loop
findings.body: Worth adding a case asserting attempts == maxAttempts on a persistent 503, and that ShouldRetry is false on 2xx.

diagrams.title: Request flow — where retry now plugs in
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  caller([Caller]) --> do[Client.Do]
  do -->|each attempt| rt[http.RoundTripper]
  do -->|consult| rp[RetryPolicy]:::added
  rp -->|ShouldRetry?| do
  rp -->|Backoff delay| do
  do --> resp([Response])
  classDef added fill:#d7f5dd,stroke:#1a7f37,color:#0b3d1f

diagrams.title: What changed
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  PR["Extract retry/backoff into RetryPolicy"]
  PR --> a["New RetryPolicy: Backoff + ShouldRetry"]:::added
  PR --> b["Client composes RetryPolicy"]:::changed
  PR --> c["Per-attempt context check"]:::added
  PR --> e["Table tests for backoff growth"]:::added
  classDef added fill:#d7f5dd,stroke:#1a7f37,color:#0b3d1f
  classDef changed fill:#fff3cd,stroke:#9a6700,color:#5a3d00
